name: manage_page_comments
description: Read comments on a Page post and reply to them. Useful for community management, customer engagement, and automated response workflows on Facebook Pages.

parameters.name: post_id
parameters.description: The ID of the post to read or reply to comments on (format: page_id_post_id).

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated fields to return for each comment (e.g., id, message, from, created_time).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of comments to return. Default is 25.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: When using POST method to reply, the text content of the reply comment.

data.message: Love this product! When is it available?
